headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Altria Group (MO) After A 21% One Year Rally?
summary: Wondering if Altria Group at around US$66 is still offering value or if most of the opportunity is already reflected in the price? This article walks through the key numbers that matter for you. The stock has returned 2.2% over the past week, while the 1 year return sits at 21.4% and the 5 year return at 101.3%, with a year to date move of 15.2% and a 30 day return of a 0.7% decline, hinting at shifting views on both upside and risk. Recent headlines around Altria Group have focused on its...

headline: Stocks That Pay You While You Sleep
summary: Dividend income keeps flowing whether you are working, sleeping, or on vacation. For investors building a portfolio that pays whether the market is open or closed, high-yield equities offer instant liquidity and zero operational headaches that rental property and private credit cannot match. With the 10-year Treasury yielding 4.31%, the bar for risk assets in ... Stocks That Pay You While You Sleep

headline: 4 'Safer' Dividend Buys Out Of Barron's 23 April Better Bets Than T-Bills
summary: Long-term bond yields persist under pressure. But investors looking for income can still find plenty of attractive opportunities with dividend-paying stocks that have healthy yields.

headline: 3 Passive Income Stocks That Will Pad Your Wallet
summary: Dividend income arrives regardless of employment status. The check arrives whether markets are up, the economy is in recession, or you are on a beach in Portugal. That separation between cash flow and effort makes high-yield dividend stocks useful for anyone building portfolio income.
